notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes reaches on a fielder's choice. Chandler Simpson to 2nd. Chandler Simpson advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop Zach Neto.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel grounds out, second baseman Ben Williamson to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.

notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Trey Mancini. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Trey Mancini. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.
